words.definitionEn: used before a noun to refer to a single unspecified thing
words.definitionTh: หนึ่ง / บ่งชี้คำนามที่ไม่เจาะจง
words.example: I saw a dog in the park.

words.definitionEn: to leave someone or something permanently
words.definitionTh: ทอดทิ้ง / ละทิ้ง
words.example: They had to abandon the car in the snow.

words.definitionEn: the skill or power to do something
words.definitionTh: ความสามารถ
words.example: She has the ability to solve problems quickly.

words.definitionEn: having the skill, means, or opportunity to do something
words.definitionTh: สามารถ / มีความสามารถ
words.example: He is able to speak three languages.

words.definitionEn: on the subject of; approximately
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับ / ประมาณ
words.example: We talked about the movie for hours.

words.definitionEn: in or to a higher place than something
words.definitionTh: เหนือ / ข้างบน
words.example: The plane flew above the clouds.

words.definitionEn: in or to a foreign country
words.definitionTh: ต่างประเทศ
words.example: She has lived abroad for five years.

words.definitionEn: total and complete; not qualified in any way
words.definitionTh: โดยสมบูรณ์ / เด็ดขาด
words.example: There was absolute silence in the room.

words.definitionEn: completely and totally
words.definitionTh: อย่างสมบูรณ์ / อย่างยิ่ง
words.example: I am absolutely sure about my decision.

words.definitionEn: relating to education, especially higher education
words.definitionTh: ทางวิชาการ / นักวิชาการ
words.example: She had an excellent academic record.

words.definitionEn: to agree to receive or take something offered
words.definitionTh: ยอมรับ / รับเอา
words.example: She accepted the job offer immediately.

words.definitionEn: satisfactory; able to be agreed to
words.definitionTh: ยอมรับได้ / เป็นที่พอใจ
words.example: The results were acceptable to everyone.

words.definitionEn: the means or right to enter or use something
words.definitionTh: การเข้าถึง / เข้าถึง
words.example: Students have access to the library online.

words.definitionEn: an unexpected event that causes damage or injury
words.definitionTh: อุบัติเหตุ
words.example: He was injured in a car accident.

words.definitionEn: a place to live or stay
words.definitionTh: ที่พัก
words.example: The hotel offers comfortable accommodation.

words.definitionEn: to go somewhere with someone
words.definitionTh: ไปด้วย / ร่วมทาง
words.example: She accompanied her friend to the doctor.

words.definitionEn: as stated or reported by someone or something
words.definitionTh: ตามที่ / อ้างอิงจาก
words.example: According to the news, it will rain tomorrow.

words.definitionEn: a record of money; to explain or consider
words.definitionTh: บัญชี / อธิบาย
words.example: Please check your bank account balance.

words.definitionEn: correct in every detail; without errors
words.definitionTh: แม่นยำ / ถูกต้อง
words.example: The report contains accurate information.

words.definitionEn: to say that someone has done something wrong
words.definitionTh: กล่าวหา
words.example: He was accused of stealing the money.

words.definitionEn: to succeed in doing or getting something
words.definitionTh: บรรลุ / ทำสำเร็จ
words.example: She achieved her goal of becoming a doctor.

words.definitionEn: something done successfully with effort
words.definitionTh: ความสำเร็จ / ผลสำเร็จ
words.example: Winning the award was a great achievement.

words.definitionEn: to accept or admit that something is true
words.definitionTh: รับทราบ / ยอมรับ
words.example: She acknowledged her mistake immediately.

words.definitionEn: to obtain something, often through effort
words.definitionTh: ได้มา / ครอบครอง
words.example: He acquired a rare book at the auction.

words.definitionEn: from one side to the other of something
words.definitionTh: ข้ามไป / ตลอด
words.example: She walked across the street carefully.

words.definitionEn: to do something; an action or performance
words.definitionTh: กระทำ / การกระทำ
words.example: You must act quickly to save time.

words.definitionEn: the process of doing something
words.definitionTh: การกระทำ / การปฏิบัติ
words.example: The government must take action immediately.

words.definitionEn: doing things or moving around often
words.definitionTh: กระตือรือร้น / กระฉับกระเฉง
words.example: She stays active by playing tennis.

words.definitionEn: something that you do
words.definitionTh: กิจกรรม
words.example: Swimming is a fun outdoor activity.

words.definitionEn: a person who performs in plays or movies
words.definitionTh: นักแสดงชาย
words.example: He is a famous actor in Hollywood.

words.definitionEn: a female performer in plays or movies
words.definitionTh: นักแสดงหญิง
words.example: The actress won an award for her role.

words.definitionEn: existing in fact; real
words.definitionTh: จริง / ตามความเป็นจริง
words.example: The actual cost was higher than expected.

words.definitionEn: in fact; really
words.definitionTh: จริง ๆ / อันที่จริง
words.example: I actually enjoyed the movie a lot.

words.definitionEn: a short form of advertisement
words.definitionTh: โฆษณา (คำย่อ)
words.example: I saw a funny ad on television last night.

words.definitionEn: to change something to suit a new situation
words.definitionTh: ปรับตัว / ดัดแปลง
words.example: She quickly adapted to her new job.

words.definitionEn: to put something together with something else
words.definitionTh: เพิ่ม / บวก
words.example: Please add sugar to the coffee.

words.definitionEn: the process of adding or a thing added
words.definitionTh: การเพิ่ม / การบวก
words.example: The new hire is a great addition to the team.

words.definitionEn: extra or more than already exists
words.definitionTh: เพิ่มเติม
words.example: There will be additional costs for shipping.

words.definitionEn: the details of where someone lives; to speak to
words.definitionTh: ที่อยู่ / กล่าวถึง
words.example: Please write your address on the form.

words.definitionEn: the management of a business or organization
words.definitionTh: การบริหาร / ฝ่ายบริหาร
words.example: She works in the administration department.

words.definitionEn: to respect and approve of someone or something
words.definitionTh: ชื่นชม / นับถือ
words.example: I really admire her hard work and honesty.

words.definitionEn: to agree that something is true, often reluctantly
words.definitionTh: ยอมรับ / สารภาพ
words.example: He admitted that he had made a mistake.

words.definitionEn: to take and use an idea, or legally take a child as one's own
words.definitionTh: รับเลี้ยง / นำมาใช้
words.example: They decided to adopt a child from overseas.

words.definitionEn: a fully grown person or animal
words.definitionTh: ผู้ใหญ่
words.example: The movie is only for adults.

words.definitionEn: to move forward or make progress
words.definitionTh: ก้าวหน้า / ความก้าวหน้า
words.example: Technology continues to advance rapidly.

words.definitionEn: highly developed or complex
words.definitionTh: ก้าวหน้า / ระดับสูง
words.example: This is an advanced English class.

words.definitionEn: something helpful that gives a better position
words.definitionTh: ข้อได้เปรียบ / ประโยชน์
words.example: Speaking English is a big advantage.

words.definitionEn: an exciting or dangerous experience
words.definitionTh: การผจญภัย
words.example: Traveling alone was a great adventure.

words.definitionEn: to promote a product or service publicly
words.definitionTh: โฆษณา
words.example: Companies advertise their products on TV.

words.definitionEn: a public notice promoting a product or event
words.definitionTh: โฆษณา (คำเต็ม)
words.example: I saw an advertisement for a new phone.

words.definitionEn: the activity of promoting products
words.definitionTh: การโฆษณา / วงการโฆษณา
words.example: She works in advertising for a big agency.

words.definitionEn: an opinion offered to help someone decide
words.definitionTh: คำแนะนำ
words.example: My teacher gave me good advice.

words.definitionEn: to give someone advice or a recommendation
words.definitionTh: แนะนำ
words.example: The doctor advised him to rest.

words.definitionEn: an event or a matter; a romantic relationship
words.definitionTh: เรื่อง / กิจการ
words.example: The wedding was a lovely affair.

words.definitionEn: to influence or cause a change in something
words.definitionTh: มีผลกระทบ / ส่งผลต่อ
words.example: The weather affects my mood.

words.definitionEn: to have enough money or time for something
words.definitionTh: มีเงินพอ / สามารถจ่ายได้
words.example: I can't afford a new car right now.

words.definitionEn: feeling fear or worry
words.definitionTh: กลัว / วิตกกังวล
words.example: I'm afraid of spiders.

words.definitionEn: later than or following something
words.definitionTh: หลังจาก
words.example: We met after the meeting.

words.definitionEn: the period between noon and evening
words.definitionTh: ตอนบ่าย
words.example: Let's meet this afternoon at three.

words.definitionEn: at a later time; after that
words.definitionTh: หลังจากนั้น
words.example: We had dinner and went home afterwards.

words.definitionEn: one more time; once more
words.definitionTh: อีกครั้ง
words.example: Please say that again.

words.definitionEn: in opposition to; touching for support
words.definitionTh: ต่อต้าน / พิงกับ
words.example: She leaned against the wall.

words.definitionEn: the length of time a person has lived
words.definitionTh: อายุ / แก่ตัวลง
words.example: What is the age of your child?

words.definitionEn: of a specified age; very old
words.definitionTh: มีอายุ / สูงอายุ
words.example: The aged wine tasted excellent.

words.definitionEn: a business providing a specific service
words.definitionTh: หน่วยงาน / ตัวแทน
words.example: She works for a travel agency.

words.definitionEn: a list of items to be discussed at a meeting
words.definitionTh: วาระการประชุม
words.example: The first item on the agenda is the budget.

words.definitionEn: a person who represents others in business
words.definitionTh: ตัวแทน / เจ้าหน้าที่
words.example: My travel agent booked the flight.

words.definitionEn: ready to attack or confront; forceful
words.definitionTh: ก้าวร้าว / รุกราน
words.example: The dog became aggressive when scared.

words.definitionEn: before now; in the past
words.definitionTh: ที่แล้ว
words.example: I met her two years ago.

words.definitionEn: to have the same opinion; to consent
words.definitionTh: เห็นด้วย / ตกลง
words.example: I agree with your opinion.

words.definitionEn: an arrangement or accord between parties
words.definitionTh: ข้อตกลง / ความเห็นพ้อง
words.example: The two sides reached an agreement.

words.definitionEn: used to express surprise or realization
words.definitionTh: อ๋อ / อ้า (คำอุทาน)
words.example: Ah, now I understand!

words.definitionEn: in front; in the future
words.definitionTh: ข้างหน้า / ล่วงหน้า
words.example: There is a traffic jam ahead.

words.definitionEn: help or assistance; to help
words.definitionTh: ความช่วยเหลือ / ช่วยเหลือ
words.example: They sent aid to the flood victims.

words.definitionEn: a goal; to point or direct toward something
words.definitionTh: จุดมุ่งหมาย / เล็ง
words.example: Our aim is to reduce costs by 10%.

words.definitionEn: the mixture of gases we breathe
words.definitionTh: อากาศ
words.example: The air is fresh in the mountains.

words.definitionEn: any machine that flies
words.definitionTh: อากาศยาน
words.example: The aircraft landed safely.

words.definitionEn: a company that transports people by air
words.definitionTh: สายการบิน
words.example: This airline offers cheap flights.

words.definitionEn: a place where aircraft take off and land
words.definitionTh: สนามบิน
words.example: We arrived at the airport early.

words.definitionEn: a warning signal; to worry someone
words.definitionTh: สัญญาณเตือน / ตกใจ
words.example: Set the alarm for 6 a.m.

words.definitionEn: a collection of songs or photos
words.definitionTh: อัลบั้ม
words.example: Her new album is amazing.

words.definitionEn: a drink like beer or wine
words.definitionTh: แอลกอฮอล์ / เครื่องดื่มมึนเมา
words.example: He does not drink alcohol.

words.definitionEn: containing alcohol; addicted to alcohol
words.definitionTh: ที่มีแอลกอฮอล์ / คนติดสุรา
words.example: This is a non-alcoholic drink.

words.definitionEn: living; not dead
words.definitionTh: มีชีวิต / ยังไม่ตาย
words.example: The plant is still alive after the winter.

words.definitionEn: the whole of a group or thing
words.definitionTh: ทั้งหมด
words.example: All students must attend the meeting.

words.definitionEn: acceptable or in a satisfactory way
words.definitionTh: โอเค / ไม่เป็นไร
words.example: Are you all right after the fall?

words.definitionEn: to give permission for something
words.definitionTh: อนุญาต
words.example: Smoking is not allowed here.

words.definitionEn: very nearly; not quite
words.definitionTh: เกือบ
words.example: It is almost midnight.

words.definitionEn: without others; by oneself
words.definitionTh: โดยลำพัง / คนเดียว
words.example: She lives alone in the city.

words.definitionEn: moving in a line following the length of
words.definitionTh: ไปตาม / ตลอด
words.example: We walked along the beach.

words.definitionEn: before now or before that time
words.definitionTh: เรียบร้อยแล้ว / แล้ว
words.example: I have already finished my homework.

words.definitionEn: in addition; too
words.definitionTh: อีกด้วย / ด้วย
words.example: She sings and also plays the guitar.

words.definitionEn: to change something slightly
words.definitionTh: เปลี่ยนแปลง / แก้ไข
words.example: The tailor will alter the dress.

words.definitionEn: a different choice or option
words.definitionTh: ทางเลือก
words.example: Is there an alternative to this plan?

words.definitionEn: despite the fact that; though
words.definitionTh: แม้ว่า
words.example: Although it was raining, we went out.

words.definitionEn: at all times; every time
words.definitionTh: เสมอ / ตลอดเวลา
words.example: She is always kind to everyone.

words.definitionEn: very surprised
words.definitionTh: ประหลาดใจมาก
words.example: I was amazed by her singing.

words.definitionEn: extremely surprising or impressive
words.definitionTh: น่าอัศจรรย์
words.example: The view from the top was amazing.

words.definitionEn: a strong desire to achieve something
words.definitionTh: ความทะเยอทะยาน
words.example: Her ambition is to become a doctor.

words.definitionEn: having a strong desire for success
words.definitionTh: ทะเยอทะยาน
words.example: He is an ambitious young lawyer.
